description: This leatherworking pattern is used for the Leatherworking profession. It is sold by Almaador. In the Leatherworking Patterns category. An item.
name: Pattern: Greater Drums of Battle

normalized_requirements.raw_text: Pattern: Greater Drums of Battle Item Level 75 Binds when picked up Requires Leatherworking (365) Requires The Sha'tar - Honored Use: Teaches you how to craft Greater Drums of Battle. Sell Price: 3 Greater Drums of Battle Item Level 73 Requires Leatherworking (350) Use: Increases melee, ranged and spell haste rating on party members within 40 yards by 80. Lasts 30 sec. Drums can be used while shapeshifted. (2 Min Cooldown) 50 Charges Sell Price: 50 Requires Heavy Knothide Leather (6), Thick Clefthoof Leather (4) This leatherworking pattern is used for the Leatherworking profession. It is sold by Almaador. In the Leatherworking Patterns category. An item.
